title: Medical Emergencies Review — Medical, Behavioral & Geriatric
subtitle: The Ultimate Provider Course Reviewer
edition: Aligned with current GINA, ADA, AHA/ASA stroke, and DSM-5-TR guidance; scoped to the NREMT Paramedic Medical/OB-GYN domain
description: A comprehensive, self-contained study reviewer for adult medical, behavioral, and geriatric emergencies. Each chapter includes a concise summary, clinical pearls, red flags, common mistakes, memory aids, high-yield flashcards, exam-style quiz questions with rationales, realistic scenarios, and comparison tables. Designed for EMTs, paramedics, and nursing/allied-health students preparing for licensing-style cognitive exams (Prometric-administered, NREMT-aligned).

chapters.title: Neurological Emergencies II — Seizures & Altered Mental Status
Behavioral Emergencies II — Psychotic & Mood Disorders
Behavioral Emergencies III — Personality, Substance-Related & High-Risk Presentations
Geriatric Emergencies I — Delirium vs. Dementia & Atypical Presentations
Geriatric Emergencies II — Polypharmacy, Falls & Elder Abuse Recognition
Sepsis, GI/Renal Emergencies & General Medical Red Flags
